message:
perf(fr-store): replace BTreeMap with HashMap+BTreeSet for O(1) key lookups

Refactor Store's primary data structure from BTreeMap<Vec<u8>, Entry> to
HashMap<Vec<u8>, Entry> + BTreeSet<Vec<u8>> (ordered_keys), gaining O(1)
amortized lookups while preserving sorted iteration for SCAN, KEYS, and
state_digest determinism:

- Add ordered_keys BTreeSet maintained in sync with entries HashMap
- Extract ordered_physical_keys_in_db() helper for DB-scoped key iteration
- Update keys_in_db(), keys_matching(), keys_matching_in_db() to use
  ordered_keys for iteration and HashMap for entry access
- Update active_expire_cycle(), state_digest(), SCAN cursor logic
- Fix MIGRATE command to shut down TCP stream after completion
- Fix accept_connections to shut down stream on registration failure
- Use saturating_add for dirty counter in flush_all

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
